description: Add storage and server actions for personal access tokens.

userStories.title: Add hashed token storage
userStories.description: As a developer, I want hashed personal access token storage with revokedAt defaulting to null so token data remains secure and revocable.
acceptanceCriteria: Token records store only hashed token values.
revokedAt defaults to null for active tokens.

userStories.title: Add create-token server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a create-token server action that validates label length and returns the plaintext token once so callers can capture it at creation time.
acceptanceCriteria: Create-token server action validates label length before saving a token.
Successful token creation returns plaintext token once while storing only the hash.

userStories.title: Add revoke-token server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a revoke-token server action that marks a token revoked without deleting it so token history remains intact.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke-token server action sets revokedAt for targeted token instead of deleting the record.
Revoked tokens can no longer be used after revocation completes.
